name: Indic AI Skills
description: A curated collection of AI skills for Indian languages and services. Includes TTS/STT, translation, payment integrations, train booking, ride-sharing, news, astrology, and ONDC platform support. Covers 23+ Indian languages via Sarvam AI.
review: Exceptional collection targeting Indian ecosystem with 23+ language support. Provides immense value for localized capabilities including Sarvam AI (TTS/STT/translation), payment integrations (PhonePe, Razorpay), travel (IRCTC, Namma Yatri), ONDC e-commerce platform, and more. Highly unique in catalog with no direct competition. Comprehensive documentation and clear setup instructions. Modular structure supports ongoing development and community contributions.
